Actions.Text: AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO PEOPLE WITH DISABILITIES
REPORTED REFERRED TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Directs the office for people with developmental disabilities to conduct a study on housing models that support independent living for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities
Summary: Directs the office for people with developmental disabilities to conduct a study on the feasibility of establishing, implementing and expanding additional housing models that support independent living for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities; requires the office to submit a report on such study to the governor, the temporary president of the senate and the speaker of the assembly.
ActClause: AN ACT to direct the office for people with developmental disabilities to conduct a study on housing models that support independent living for people with intellectual and developmental disabilities
